config.allowed_usernames.description: Comma-separated Telegram usernames (without @) allowed to use the bot. Leave empty to allow all.
bot.start:
Astra Telegram Bot is active.

/new [title] — Create a new conversation topic
/list — Link an existing Astra conversation

Send any message in a topic to chat with Astra.

bot.all_linked: All conversations are already linked to topics.
